biological_replicate: purchased Syrian golden hamsters (Mesocricetus auratus) of the HsdHan:AURA strain at 3–4 weeks of age.
technical_replicate: biologically triplicated RNA-seq data for each biological condition.
experimental_design: hamster hosts that either had normal immune systems or were immunosuppressed by dexamethasone.
factor_value: normal immune systems or were immunosuppressed by dexamethasone
number_of_biological_replicates: half of each set of hamsters
number_of_samples: at least two groups (immunocompetent and immunocompromised)
